text: I haven't noticed too much of a difference so far. I did not put it on near my eyes but somehow the whole area around my eyes is bright red and very sensitive. (I look like a raccoon.) It burns my face - especially around my eyes - when I use any moisturizer or sunscreen. I had to switch to a milder cleanser to reduce irritation. My dermatologist prescribed this with a water pill and some kind of anti-bacteria medicine to treat my acne. I have been on Yaz for a year and it has not helped my acne at all. All over the counter medicines have been ineffective. I mostly break out around my period and I only get pimples where I have hair folicles.
